title: rubus distractiformis
intro: Rubus distractiformis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus distractiformis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antiviral and antibacterial properties. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
